name: pr-review-loop
description: Complete PR review cycle: checkout branch, read comments, make fixes, build, commit, respond, resolve conversations, wait on CI, and fix issues
documentation: Runs a full PR review and fix loop: checks out the branch, merges from main, inspects review comments, applies fixes, runs builds/tests, commits changes, updates the PR with responses, resolves conversations when appropriate, waits for CI, and iterates on any resulting issues.
